title: BetterVannilaFishes
description: Dive into a more vibrant and diverse ocean. Re-imagined, re-animated, and re-alive.
body:
Tired of the same old generic fish swimming in Minecraft's oceans? **Better Vannila Fishes** is a complete overhaul of aquatic life, designed to bring a new level of realism, depth, and excitement to your underwater explorations.

This mod **removes the default vanilla fish** (Cod, Salmon, Pufferfish, Tropical Fish) from world generation, replacing them with a carefully crafted roster of **31 new, realistic species** — from colorful reef dwellers to apex ocean predators — each with unique behaviors, uses, and stunning GeckoLib-powered animations.

---

## 🌟 What Does This Mod Add? 🌟

### 🐟 Cod — 3 Species
Regional variants of the classic cod, each with distinct appearances:
- **Atlantic Cod** (*Gadus morhua*) — The iconic North Atlantic staple.
- **Pacific Cod** (*Gadus macrocephalus*) — Its Pacific cousin.
- **Haddock** (*Melanogrammus aeglefinus*) — A valuable bottom-dwelling species.

### 🐠 Salmon — 3 Species
- **Male Salmon** — Distinguished by its vibrant coloration.
- **Female Salmon** — Subtler hues, equally important.
- **Pacific Salmon** (*Oncorhynchus nerka*) — The iconic red salmon of the Pacific.

### 🐡 Pufferfish — 3 Species
Beautiful but deadly — handle with care! Each features a realistic inflation mechanic:
- **Yellow Fin Puffer** (*Diodon holocanthus*)
- **Obscure Puffer** (*Takifugu obscurus*)
- **Porcupine Fish** (*Diodon holocanthus*)

### 🔵 Surgeonfish — 6 Species *(NEW!)*
A vibrant family of coral reef fish, perfect for bringing tropical reefs to life:
- **Achilles Tang** (*Acanthurus achilles*)
- **Powder Blue Tang** (*Acanthurus leucosternon*)
- **Blue Tang** (*Paracanthurus hepatus*) — Yes, that's Dory!
- **Convict Tang** (*Acanthurus triostegus*)
- **Whitecheek Surgeonfish** (*Acanthurus nigricans*)
- **Lined Surgeonfish** (*Acanthurus lineatus*)

### 🟠 Clownfish — 6 Species *(NEW!)*
Replacing vanilla Tropical Fish with realistic, individually modeled clownfish species:
- **Ocellaris Clownfish** (*Amphiprion ocellaris*) — The classic Nemo!
- **Spine-cheeked Clownfish** (*Premnas biaculeatus*)
- **Saddleback Clownfish** (*Amphiprion polymnus*)
- **Pink Skunk Clownfish** (*Amphiprion perideraion*)
- **Clark's Clownfish** (*Amphiprion clarkii*)
- **Orange Clownfish** (*Amphiprion percula*)

### 🌿 Cichlid — 6 Species *(NEW!)*
Freshwater tropical fish found in rivers and swamps:
- **Chameleon Cichlid** (*Australoheros facetus*)
- **Black Acara** (*Cichlasoma bimaculatum*)
- **Guyana Eartheater** (*Krobia guianensis*)
- **Saddle Cichlid** (*Aequidens tetramerus*)
- **Paraguay Eartheater** (*Gymnogeophagus balzanii*)
- **Oscar** (*Astronotus ocellatus*)

### 🦈 Tiger Shark *(NEW!)*
**居氏鼬鲨** (*Galeocerdo cuvier*) — A formidable apex predator now patrols the deep ocean!
- **80 HP** and **15 attack damage** — a true threat to unprepared divers.
- **3 color variants**: Original, White, and Contrast.
- Attacks fish and any creature affected by the **Bleeding** effect.
- Custom shark-specific navigation and attack AI.
- Drops **Shark's Fin** — a unique trophy item.
- Can be displayed as a **Tiger Shark Specimen** mount!

### 🗡️ Spearfish *(NEW!)*
**条纹枪鱼** (*Kajikia audax*) — A fast, aggressive ocean hunter:
- Will charge and strike when threatened, dealing AoE damage.
- Spawns in varying sizes — from sleek juveniles to massive adults.
- Drops cook into a hearty **Cooked Spearfish** meal.

### 🌺 Feather Star *(NEW!)*
**海羽星** — A graceful, alien-like sea creature:
- Moves by graceful hopping across the ocean floor.
- Drops **Feather Star Tentacles** — a unique crafting material.

### 🐚 Nautilus
A prehistoric wonder of the deep, now more than just a conduit ingredient:
- **Tameable** using Tropical Fish! Once tamed, follows you faithfully.
- Provides the **Nautilus Blessing** buff to nearby players: restores air, removes Mining Fatigue, and boosts attack speed.
- Retreats into its shell when threatened, gaining powerful damage absorption.
- The ultimate aquatic companion for ocean explorers.

---

## ⚙️ Mechanics & Features

### 🏊 Custom Swimming AI
All creatures are brought to life with a **custom, advanced swimming and turning system** with GeckoLib animations, making their movements fluid, realistic, and a joy to watch. Fish form natural **flocking groups** with leader-follower dynamics.

### ⚖️ Size Variation & Trophies
Not all fish are created equal! Cod, Salmon, Spearfish and more spawn in a range of different sizes. Celebrate your biggest catch with **8 types of Taxidermy Specimen mounts** — including a massive Tiger Shark display!

### ⚔️ Enchanted Pufferfish
Craft pufferfish drops into the **Enchanted Pufferfish** — a unique ranged weapon that automatically locks onto nearby undead and guardians, firing devastating energy beams.

## 📖 Summary

| Feature | Details |
|---|---|
| **Total New Species** | 31 unique creatures across 8 families |
| **Replaces** | Vanilla Cod, Salmon, Pufferfish, Tropical Fish |
| **New Families** | Surgeonfish, Clownfish, Cichlid, Shark, Spearfish, Feather Star |
| **Custom AI** | Flocking, charging attacks, shark hunting, shell retreat |
| **Status Effects** | Nautilus Blessing, Bleeding, Purification |
| **Special Items** | Enchanted Pufferfish, Shark's Fin, Feather Star Tentacle |
| **Decorations** | 8 Taxidermy Specimen mounts |
| **Tameable** | Nautilus — grants powerful area buffs |
| **Animation** | Full GeckoLib-powered models and animations |
| **Languages** | English & 简体中文 |

**Dive Deeper. Explore Further. The ocean has never been more alive!**
